title: Agetic lidera proceso de creación de la primera estrategia nacional de ciberseguridad en Bolivia
description: ABI news item: AGETIC leads creation of Bolivia's first national cybersecurity strategy. Domestic government activity but no explicit post-quantum/quantum-safe cryptography reference; also a state news-agency article, not the document itself.

title: Acerca del CGII | Centro de Gestión de Incidentes Informáticos
description: About page of Bolivia's national CSIRT (CGII), the computer incident management centre under AGETIC, created by Decree 2514. Domestic institutional but no PQC/quantum-safe content.

title: Documento de Seguridad SEG-001 - Estado Plurinacional de Bolivia (CGII)
description: CGII information-security policy/guideline document (2017). Domestic institutional cybersecurity guidance; covers cryptographic controls generally but does not mention post-quantum/quantum-safe cryptography.

title: Aprueban PL que declara prioridad nacional la elaboración e implementación de la Estrategia Nacional de Ciberseguridad de Estado
description: Bolivian Senate press notice on approval of a bill declaring the National Cybersecurity Strategy a national priority. Domestic institutional but no explicit PQC/quantum-resistant reference.

title: Plan de Implementación de Gobierno Electrónico - AGETIC (PIGE)
description: AGETIC e-government implementation plan. Mentions cryptographic mechanisms for safeguarding public-sector information but contains no post-quantum/quantum-safe cryptography reference.

title: Plan de Gobierno Electrónico - AGETIC (PIGE, hosted on ctic.gob.bo)
description: CTIC cybersecurity forum thread referencing Bolivian government cybersecurity. Forum/community content; no explicit PQC reference.

title: Plan de Implementación de Gobierno Electrónico (OOPP)
description: Ministry of Public Works (OOPP) e-government implementation plan. Domestic institutional; references cryptography generically, no post-quantum/quantum-safe content.

title: BOLIVIA INGRESA A LA ERA DE LA FIRMA DIGITAL | ATT
description: ATT (telecom/transport regulator) announcement on digital signature in Bolivia (ATT as Root Certifying Entity). Domestic institutional but concerns classical PKI/digital signature; no PQC/quantum-resistant reference.

title: Revista Ciencia y Tecnología Digital Vol.1, Núm.1 (2025) - USFX (cryptocurrency cybersecurity in Bolivia)
description: Academic journal article (Universidad San Francisco Xavier) on cryptocurrency security and the Bolivian financial sector. Academic/university source - excluded as non-institutional; PQC not the focus.

title: Cómo gestionar la Ciberseguridad Financiera en Bolivia según ASFI (Pirani)
description: Vendor blog summarising ASFI financial-cybersecurity requirements. Non-institutional vendor content; no PQC reference. ASFI's own RNSF cyber rules do not mention post-quantum cryptography.
